name: Python FastAPI
description: Creates a modern, async Python API using FastAPI and Uvicorn.

commands.command: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path {{projectName}} ; cd {{projectName}} ; python -m venv venv
commands.description: Create project directory and initialize Python virtual environment.

commands.command: if (Test-Path {{projectName}}) { cd {{projectName}} } ; .\venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1 ; pip install {{flags}} ; pip freeze > requirements.txt
commands.description: Activate venv, install FastAPI dynamically (defaulting to standard), and freeze dependencies.

commands.command: if (Test-Path {{projectName}}) { cd {{projectName}} } ; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path src ; Out-File -FilePath src\main.py -Encoding utf8 -InputObject "from fastapi import FastAPI`n`napp = FastAPI()`n`n@app.get('/health')`ndef health_check():`n    return {'status': 'ok'}"
commands.description: Create the src directory and the main application entry point using double quotes so PowerShell expands the `n escape characters.
